### Description

Please explain the changes you made, the motivation behind them, and what problem they solve.

### Type of Change

Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update (non-breaking change to docs)

### Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [Contributing guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md) and [Development guide](https://olib-ai.github.io/mailcue/guides/development.html).
- [ ] My code follows the code style and formatting standards of this project.
- [ ] I have run local linting and type-checks (`ruff`, `mypy`, `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`) and they all passed.
- [ ] I have added/updated tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works.
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes.
- [ ] I have run `python3 scripts/build_docs.py` if I made any changes to the markdown guides in `docs/guides/`.
